---
title: import-shadowing
description: "Detect declarations shadowing imports."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect declarations shadowing imports. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
json := loadConfig() // shadows the json import
```

## Good

```go
encoded := json.Marshal(value)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only import-shadowing`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
